summary: Verified new date/time fix: static type + overlay span approach. All acceptance criteria met — type never swaps (always 'date'/'time'), zero layout jump on focus/value change (0.00px measured), custom overlay span shows/hides correctly when empty/filled, text-transparent toggles to hide native jj/mm/aaaa when empty and text-gray-900 when filled. Placeholders validated in all 5 languages (EN/FR/RU/HY/ES). Calendar-picker-indicator CSS rule with opacity 0.55 confirmed. Note: native picker single-tap behavior cannot be objectively asserted from Chromium headless (browser controls picker UI), but the underlying cause of the previous double-tap bug (type-swap causing focus loss) is definitively eliminated — type stays 'date'/'time' across focus, input, change events.
critical_code_review_comments: Home.js is very large (>1000 lines) — consider extracting the booking form into a component.
Google Maps API is loaded without loading=async (console warning). Minor performance issue.
PlacesAutocomplete uses deprecated google.maps.places.Autocomplete (will lose new customer support per March 2025 notice). Consider migration to PlaceAutocompleteElement.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Verified date/time overlay fix on Home.js. Measurements: box width identical (153.00px) before focus, on focus, and after value=set — zero layout jump. type attribute stays 'date'/'time' at all states (never swaps to 'text'). Overlay span text: EN='Select a date/time', FR='Choisir une date/heure', RU='Выберите дату/время', HY='Ընտրեք ամսաթիվ/ժամ', ES='Elige una fecha/hora'. CSS rules (::-webkit-datetime-edit transparent under .date-native.text-transparent, and ::-webkit-calendar-picker-indicator opacity 0.55) confirmed loaded.

verification_details.overlay_when_empty: PASS — span present, visible, correct localized text
verification_details.overlay_hidden_when_filled: PASS — span text becomes empty and class flips text-transparent→text-gray-900
verification_details.clear_restores_overlay: PASS — clearing value restores 'Select a date' overlay
verification_details.css_rules_present: PASS — datetime-edit transparent rule + calendar-picker-indicator opacity 0.55 rule both found in stylesheets
verification_details.desktop_1280x900: PASS — same behavior, overlay + type=date maintained
verification_details.i18n: PASS — all 5 languages show correct overlay text
